creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

I just checked your website.  But I was unable to verify the information 
provided in your request.  In fact your website does not mention FreeBSD 
at all.  The only thing I could find is this:

"Our services - Administration:

     Operating Systems Windows, Linux and AIX.
     SQL Database and Oracle
     SAP Basis Administration"

We will only list provider with "FreeBSD support" on our webpage.  So 
unless we can get some more prove how FreeBSD is available to your 
customers, I will have to close this report.

Regards


jkois


-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
